page_content:
P a g e  9 / 9  
 
4.5. Summary of Milestone 2 Updates 
By unifying our object detection classes into the DSAI-Unified-Lite format, 
standardizing depth maps via NYU-Depth V2, and selecting the high-performance 
Piper TTS, the team has moved from a broad list of potential datasets to a verified, 
high-speed production pipeline. 
This concludes the data preparation phase, providing the necessary foundation for 
the end-to-end integration verified in Milestone 3.
